subcodes.first_line: Your letter of December 15, 1919, was received, and its perusal brought the utmost joy. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما در ١٥ کانون اول ١٩١٩ رسید و از مطالعه اش نهایت سرور حاصل گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
